hooks.command: jq -c 'if (.tool_name == "mcp__github__merge_pull_request") or (.tool_name == "mcp__github__update_pull_request" and .tool_input.state == "closed") then {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "ask", permissionDecisionReason: "Closing or merging a PR is irreversible and outward-facing. Confirm this was explicitly requested and is not a batched or speculative action."}} else empty end'
